questionHtml: Explain, by reference to the power dissipated in the wire, the advantage of the fixed resistor connected in series with the wire for the measurement of R.
markschemeHtml:
measurement should be performed at a constant temperature
OR
resistance of wire changes with temperature ✔

series resistance prevents the wire from overheating
OR
reduces power dissipated in the wire ✔

by reducing voltage across/current through the wire ✔

meta.title: Explain, by reference to the power dissipated in the wire, the advantage of the fixed resistor connected in series with the wire for the measurement of R.
